projects.title: Islamic Group Manager Telegram Bot
projects.description: A robust, asynchronous Telegram bot designed to manage and track group Quran readings (Khetma)[cite: 14, 15]. Built with Python and PostgreSQL, this bot features real-time inline keyboard updates, Arabic language pattern matching, and a clean, event-driven backend architecture[cite: 14, 21].
highlights: Concurrency Safety: Prevented race conditions (like two users reserving the same chapter at the exact same millisecond) using strict database-level constraints[cite: 26].
Domain-Driven Design: Engineered custom domain exceptions (e.g., ChapterNotOwnedError, ChapterFinishedError) ensuring graceful UI error handling without app crashes[cite: 30].
Efficient Database I/O: Implemented bulk SQL updates and prevented the N+1 query problem to ensure the bot remains fast and memory-efficient even in large groups[cite: 31].
Advanced Parsing: Engineered robust Arabic pattern matching to extract numbers seamlessly from natural user text regardless of format (e.g., '21', 'الحادي والعشرون', '٢١')[cite: 24].

projects.title: Enterprise Task Management API
projects.description: A secure, multi-layered RESTful API built with ASP.NET Core and Entity Framework Core. Features comprehensive JWT authentication and a robust Domain/Application/Infrastructure architectural split.
highlights: Global Exception Middleware: Eliminated scattered try-catch blocks by implementing a centralized middleware pipeline.
Automated Formatting: Intercepts all unhandled errors and domain rule violations, automatically formatting them into standardized RFC 7807 problem details for the client.
